description: Video tutorial QA — per-video review of recorded handbook tutorials. Each cycle reviews one video: extracts frames + audio transcript, cross-references against the config's step narration, scores the video, and flags any issues.

queue.title: McClintock 2 — Creating a tissue storage box
McClintock 3 — Putting samples in Falcon tubes
McClintock 4 — Creating a DNA archive box

dimensions.name: visual_clarity
dimensions.desc: UI visible, no covering modals, no cursor off-screen, no stale state from previous step

dimensions.name: narration_visual_sync
dimensions.desc: Subtitle/narration at time T describes what is visibly happening at time T (or about to)

dimensions.name: subtitle_legibility
dimensions.desc: Subtitle bar never clipped, readable contrast, no overlap with page content

dimensions.name: pacing
dimensions.desc: No long dead air, no steps rushed before the UI responds, cursor moves at a followable speed

dimensions.name: cursor_guidance
dimensions.desc: Cursor points at the thing being discussed before the click; click targets are visible

dimensions.name: correctness
dimensions.desc: The tutorial actually accomplishes what the title says; final state matches the intended outcome

dimensions.name: polish
dimensions.desc: Intro/outro clean, no obvious glitches, overlay elements rendered properly

issue_severity.blocker: Re-record required — viewer won't be able to follow along
issue_severity.major: Meaningful usability hit — consider re-record or edit
issue_severity.minor: Polish item — ship as-is, fix in next round
issue_severity.nitpick: Would notice only on careful review
